meaning: Research and Development Board(美国)研究与发展局
examples: The RDB schemas assist in creating the RDB data mapping.
The DAD format for this mapping is also an RDB node mapping that creates the side tables.
In addition to having the functionality of an RDB, DB2 9 also has the functionality of an XML database (XMLDB).
Redcar and Cleveland Borough Council says that since it introduced the RDB rating scheme in 2001, standards of care homes across the borough have improved.
